changeSet.author: orbithealth
changeSet.comment: Backfill legacy Viral Vaccine, Virology, and Genomics notebook scope and seed a minimal stock baseline so workflow stock pickers have real lot-backed options in training/demo environments.
changeSet.sql: UPDATE clinlims.notebook SET workflow_type = 'viral_vaccine' WHERE (workflow_type IS NULL OR workflow_type = '') AND (title = 'Viral Vaccine' OR title LIKE 'Viral Vaccine - Lab %');
UPDATE clinlims.notebook SET workflow_type = 'virology' WHERE (workflow_type IS NULL OR workflow_type = '') AND (title = 'Virology Laboratory' OR title LIKE 'Virology Laboratory - Lab %');

UPDATE clinlims.notebook SET workflow_type = 'genomics' WHERE (workflow_type IS NULL OR workflow_type = '' OR workflow_type = 'gbd') AND ( title = 'Genomics & Bioinformatics Laboratory' OR title LIKE 'Genomics & Bioinformatics Laboratory - Lab %' );

WITH notebook_department_map(title, workflow_type, department_id) AS ( VALUES ('Viral Vaccine', 'viral_vaccine', 179), ('Virology Laboratory', 'virology', 76), ('Genomics & Bioinformatics Laboratory', 'genomics', 172) ) INSERT INTO clinlims.notebook_departments (notebook_id, test_section_id) SELECT n.id, ndm.department_id FROM clinlims.notebook n JOIN notebook_department_map ndm ON n.title = ndm.title OR n.title LIKE ndm.title || ' - Lab %' OR n.workflow_type = ndm.workflow_type JOIN clinlims.test_section ts ON ts.id::text = ndm.department_id::text WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.notebook_departments existing WHERE existing.notebook_id = n.id AND existing.test_section_id = ndm.department_id );

WITH seed_items(department_id, item_name, category, manufacturer, catalog_number, units, lot_number) AS ( VALUES (179, 'Viral Vaccine Growth Media', 'Media', 'AHRI Training Stock', 'VV-MEDIA-001', 'ml', 'VV-MEDIA-LOT-001'), (179, 'Viral Vaccine Supplement Reagent', 'Reagent', 'AHRI Training Stock', 'VV-REAG-001', 'ml', 'VV-REAG-LOT-001'), (76, 'Virology Cell Culture Media', 'Media', 'AHRI Training Stock', 'VIR-MEDIA-001', 'ml', 'VIR-MEDIA-LOT-001'), (76, 'Virology Buffer Reagent', 'Reagent', 'AHRI Training Stock', 'VIR-REAG-001', 'ml', 'VIR-REAG-LOT-001'), (172, 'Genomics Extraction Buffer', 'Reagent', 'AHRI Training Stock', 'GEN-REAG-001', 'ml', 'GEN-REAG-LOT-001'), (172, 'Genomics PCR Master Mix', 'Reagent', 'AHRI Training Stock', 'GEN-REAG-002', 'ml', 'GEN-REAG-LOT-002') ), inserted_items AS ( INSERT INTO clinlims.inventory_item ( id, fhir_uuid, name, item_type, category, manufacturer, catalog_number, units, low_stock_threshold, is_active, version, department_test_section_id, concentration ) SELECT nextval('clinlims.inventory_item_seq'), ( substr(md5(seed.item_name || ':' || seed.department_id), 1, 8) || '-' || substr(md5(seed.item_name || ':' || seed.department_id), 9, 4) || '-' || substr(md5(seed.item_name || ':' || seed.department_id), 13, 4) || '-' || substr(md5(seed.item_name || ':' || seed.department_id), 17, 4) || '-' || substr(md5(seed.item_name || ':' || seed.department_id), 21, 12) )::uuid, seed.item_name, 'REAGENT', seed.category, seed.manufacturer, seed.catalog_number, seed.units, 1, 'Y', 0, seed.department_id, 'N/A' FROM seed_items seed JOIN clinlims.test_section ts ON ts.id::text = seed.department_id::text WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.inventory_item existing WHERE existing.department_test_section_id = seed.department_id AND existing.name = seed.item_name ) RETURNING id, name, department_test_section_id ) INSERT INTO clinlims.inventory_lot ( id, fhir_uuid, inventory_item_id, lot_number, receipt_date, expiration_date, initial_quantity, current_quantity, qc_status, status, version, unit_size, received_by, location_type, storage_path ) SELECT nextval('clinlims.inventory_lot_seq'), ( substr(md5(seed.item_name || ':' || seed.lot_number), 1, 8) || '-' || substr(md5(seed.item_name || ':' || seed.lot_number), 9, 4) || '-' || substr(md5(seed.item_name || ':' || seed.lot_number), 13, 4) || '-' || substr(md5(seed.item_name || ':' || seed.lot_number), 17, 4) || '-' || substr(md5(seed.item_name || ':' || seed.lot_number), 21, 12) )::uuid, item.id, seed.lot_number, now(), now() + interval '365 days', 10.00, 10.00, 'PASSED', 'ACTIVE', 0, '10 ml', 'system-seed', 'general', 'Notebook Training Stock' FROM seed_items seed JOIN clinlims.inventory_item item ON item.department_test_section_id = seed.department_id AND item.name = seed.item_name WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.inventory_lot existing WHERE existing.inventory_item_id = item.id AND existing.lot_number = seed.lot_number );
